# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Report vulnerabilities privately via
[GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/vinceamstoutz/symfony-security-auditor/security/advisories/new).

Include:

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Suggested fix (if any)

You will receive a response within 72 hours. Once confirmed, a fix will be
released as soon as possible and you will be credited in the advisory (unless
you prefer otherwise).
